❓ తరచుగా అడిగే ప్రశ్నలు (FAQ)
📝 Free లో Exams ఎలా చేయాలి? ▾
YouTube లో Anil EduTech channel ని Subscribe చేయండి → Register చేయండి → Login చేయండి → ఇప్పుడే Exams start చేయండి! 100% Free.
🔑 Password మర్చిపోయారా? ▾
Login page లో "Forgot Password?" click చేయండి, మీ Gmail ID enter చేయండి. Admin మీ password reset చేస్తారు. లేదా WhatsApp లో contact చేయండి.
⭐ Premium plan ఏమిటి? ▾
Premium లో exclusive exams, detailed analytics, priority support మరియు more features ఉంటాయి. Nav లో ⭐ Premium button click చేసి plans చూడండి.
📊 నా Progress ఎలా చూడాలి? ▾
Login అయిన తర్వాత Nav లో "నా Progress" button click చేయండి. మీరు చేసిన అన్ని exams scores, percentage మరియు history అక్కడ కనిపిస్తుంది.
🔔 Notifications ఎలా enable చేయాలి? ▾
Home page లో "🔔 Notify Me" button click చేయండి. Browser notification permission allow చేయండి. Daily reminders మీకు వస్తాయి!
📩 మాకు Message పంపండి
మీ problem లేదా feedback ఇక్కడ write చేయండి

Video

📚 Syllabus

SSC · RRB · Banking పరీక్షల పూర్తి syllabus

🎯 SSC CGL — Combined Graduate Level
📋
Tiers
Tier 1 + Tier 2
❓
Tier 1 Questions
100 Qs
🎯
Total Marks
200 Marks
⏱
Time
60 Minutes
✅
Correct Ans
+2 marks
❌
Wrong Ans
−0.5 marks
📘 TIER 1 — Syllabus (100 Questions · 200 Marks · 60 Min)
🧠 General Intelligence & Reasoning 25 Qs · 50 Marks
Analogy · Classification · Word Formation · Coding-Decoding · Blood Relations · Direction & Distance · Series (Number/Letter/Symbol) · Matrix · Ranking & Order · Venn Diagrams · Syllogism · Statement & Conclusions · Embedded Figures · Paper Folding · Mirror Image · Counting of Figures
🌍 General Awareness 25 Qs · 50 Marks
Indian History (Ancient, Medieval, Modern) · Indian Geography · Indian Polity & Constitution · Indian Economy · General Science (Physics, Chemistry, Biology) · Current Affairs (National & International) · Static GK (Books/Authors, Awards, Capitals, Currencies) · Sports & Culture · Important Days & Events · Science & Technology
🔢 Quantitative Aptitude 25 Qs · 50 Marks
Number System · HCF & LCM · Simplification · Percentage · Ratio & Proportion · Average · Profit & Loss · Simple & Compound Interest · Time & Work · Pipes & Cisterns · Time, Speed & Distance · Boat & Stream · Geometry & Mensuration (2D & 3D) · Trigonometry · Height & Distance · Algebra · Data Interpretation (Tables, Bar, Line, Pie Charts)
📖 English Comprehension 25 Qs · 50 Marks
Reading Comprehension · Cloze Test · Para Jumbles · Synonyms & Antonyms · One Word Substitution · Idioms & Phrases · Spelling Correction · Error Spotting · Sentence Correction · Fill in the Blanks · Active/Passive Voice · Direct/Indirect Speech
📗 TIER 2 — Syllabus (Descriptive + Skill Test)
📊 Paper 1 — Quantitative Abilities 100 Qs · 200 Marks · 2 Hrs
Arithmetic · Algebra · Geometry · Mensuration · Trigonometry · Statistics & Probability · Data Analysis & Interpretation
📝 Paper 2 — English Language & Comprehension 200 Qs · 200 Marks · 2 Hrs
Vocabulary · Grammar · Sentence Structure · Spot the Error · Fill in the Blanks · Synonyms · Antonyms · Passage · Comprehension · One Word Substitution · Improvement of Sentences · Active/Passive Voice · Conversion of Direct/Indirect Narration · Shuffling of Sentence Parts
📚 Paper 3 — Statistics (For JSO Post) 100 Qs · 200 Marks · 2 Hrs
Collection & Representation of Data · Measures of Central Tendency · Measures of Dispersion · Moments, Skewness & Kurtosis · Correlation & Regression · Probability Theory · Random Variables · Sampling Theory · Statistical Inference · Analysis of Variance · Time Series Analysis · Index Numbers
📌 గమనిక: Tier 1 అన్ని posts కి qualifying. Tier 2 లో marks based గా final merit list తయారవుతుంది. Negative marking ఉంది — జాగ్రత్తగా answer చేయండి.
📝 SSC CHSL (Combined Higher Secondary Level)
General Intelligence
Analogy · Series · Spatial Visualization · Problem Solving · Decision Making · Visual Memory
English Language
Spot the Error · Fill in the Blanks · Synonyms · Antonyms · Spelling · Phrases · One Word Substitution
Quantitative Aptitude
Number System · Fundamental Arithmetical Operations · Percentages · Ratio · Interest · Profit & Loss · Discount
General Awareness
India & Neighbouring Countries · Sports · History · Culture · Geography · Economy · Scientific Research
📄 SSC MTS (Multi Tasking Staff)
General Intelligence & Reasoning
Non-Verbal Reasoning · Analogy · Similarities · Differences · Space Visualization · Problem Solving
Numerical Aptitude
Number Systems · Decimals · Fractions · LCM & HCF · Ratio · Percentage · Mensuration · Time & Distance
General English
Basic Comprehension · Error Recognition · Vocabulary · Spellings · Grammar
General Awareness
Environment Awareness · India History · Geography · Culture · Economic Scene · General Polity · Scientific Research
🚆 RRB NTPC (Non Technical Popular Categories)
Mathematics
Number System · Decimals · Fractions · LCM & HCF · Ratio · Percentage · Mensuration · Time & Work · Time & Distance · Simple & Compound Interest · Profit & Loss · Elementary Algebra · Geometry · Trigonometry · Statistics
General Intelligence & Reasoning
Analogies · Completion of Number & Alphabetical Series · Coding & Decoding · Mathematical Operations · Similarities & Differences · Relationships · Analytical Reasoning · Syllogism · Jumbling · Venn Diagrams · Puzzle · Data Sufficiency
General Awareness
Current Events of National & International Importance · Games & Sports · Art & Culture · Indian Literature · Monuments & Places · General Science · Indian Railway · National & International Organizations
👷 RRB Group D
Mathematics
Number System · BODMAS · Decimals · Fractions · LCM & HCF · Ratio · Percentage · Mensuration · Time & Work · Time & Distance · Simple & Compound Interest · Profit & Loss · Elementary Algebra · Geometry & Trigonometry · Elementary Statistics
General Intelligence & Reasoning
Analogies · Alphabetical & Number Series · Coding & Decoding · Mathematical Operations · Venn Diagrams · Data Interpretation & Sufficiency · Conclusions & Decision Making · Similarities & Differences · Analytical Reasoning · Classification · Directions · Statement & Arguments
General Science
Physics · Chemistry · Life Sciences (10th standard level)
General Awareness & Current Affairs
Science & Technology · Sports · Culture · Personalities · Economics · Politics · Current Affairs of National & International Importance
🏛️ IBPS Clerk
Reasoning Ability
Logical Reasoning · Alphanumeric Series · Ranking · Data Sufficiency · Coded Inequalities · Seating Arrangement · Puzzle · Tabulation · Syllogism · Input-Output · Coding-Decoding · Blood Relations · Direction & Distance
Quantitative Aptitude
Simplification · Profit & Loss · Mixtures & Alligations · Simple & Compound Interest · Surds & Indices · Work & Time · Time & Distance · Mensuration · Data Interpretation · Ratio & Proportion · Number Systems · Sequences & Series · Permutation & Combination · Probability
English Language
Reading Comprehension · Cloze Test · Para jumbles · Error Detection · Fill in the Blanks · Multiple Meaning · Paragraph Completion
General/Financial Awareness
Banking Awareness · Financial Awareness · Govt. Schemes · Current Affairs · Static GK
🏦 SBI Clerk (Junior Associates)
Reasoning Ability & Computer Aptitude
Internet · Memory · Keyboard Shortcuts · Computer Abbreviation · Microsoft Office · Computer Hardware · Computer Software · Operating System · Networking · Computer Fundamentals · Logical Reasoning · Alphanumeric Series · Ranking · Data Sufficiency
Quantitative Aptitude
Simplification · Number Series · Data Sufficiency · Data Interpretation · Quadratic Equations · Time & Distance · Partnership · Profit & Loss · Simple & Compound Interest · Mixture & Allegations · Ratio & Proportion
English Language
Reading Comprehension · Cloze Test · Para jumbles · Miscellaneous · Fill in the blanks · Multiple Meaning/Error Spotting · Paragraph Completion
General/Financial Awareness
Current Affairs · Static Awareness · Banking Terms · RBI Functions · Monetary & Credit Policy · Budget & Five Year Plans · Government Schemes

📁 Mock Test Folders — Lock / Unlock

Folder lock చేస్తే students ఆ folder లో exams చూడగలరు కానీ admin మాత్రమే tests add చేయగలరు.

📂 All Exams

First N free:
#Exam NameCategoryTimeDifficultyQuestions📁 FolderLockActions

➕ New Exam Create చేయండి

📚 Section-wise Question Count
💡 0 పెడితే ఆ section hide అవుతుంది. Questions add చేసేటప్పుడు section select చేయాలి.
🏷️ Part Labels (Custom Subject Names)
💡 SSC కి Reasoning/GA/Arithmetic/English default గా ఉంటాయి. TSPSC లేదా వేరే exam కి ఇక్కడ మార్చుకోండి.

📥 Bulk Question Import (CSV)

🎯 Step 1 — Exam Select చేయండి (Important!)
ఇక్కడ exam select చేస్తే CSV లో examId column అవసరం లేదు — అన్ని questions automatically ఈ exam కి వెళ్తాయి.
⚠️ Exam id ని CSV లో hardcode చేస్తే తర్వాత id shift అయినప్పుడు wrong exam కి వెళ్తాయి — ఈ dropdown use చేయడం safe!
✅ Exam Selected
CSV Columns (Exam select చేస్తే examId optional):
question, optionA, optionB, optionC, optionD, answer (A/B/C/D), explanation (optional), section (optional), marks (optional), imageUrl (optional)
📂

📌 General Instructions
  • 🖥️ ఈ exam పూర్తిగా Online గా జరుగుతుంది. Screen మీద ఒక్కో question చదివి answer select చేయండి.
  • ⏱️ Timer start అవుతుంది. Time అయిపోతే exam automatically submit అవుతుంది.
  • 🔢 Question panel లో numbers click చేసి ఏ question కైనా jump చేయవచ్చు.
  • ✏️ Answer change చేయాలంటే మళ్ళీ ఆ question కి వెళ్ళి వేరే option select చేయండి.
  • ⚠️ Tab switch చేస్తే లేదా window minimize చేస్తే warning వస్తుంది — exam disqualify అవుతుంది.
  • 📵 Mobile లో అయితే exam screen వదిలి వెళ్ళకండి. Focus maintain చేయండి.

General Instructions
SSC Combined Graduate Level — Tier I (CBT)
Computer Based Test
100 Qs  |  200 Marks
Duration: 60 Minutes
📊 SSC CGL Tier-1 Exam Pattern
Part Subject Questions Marks
Part-A 🧠 General Intelligence & Reasoning 25 50
Part-B 🌍 General Awareness 25 50
Part-C 🔢 Quantitative Aptitude 25 50
Part-D 📖 English Comprehension 25 50
Total  ·  Duration: 60 Minutes 100 200
✅ Marking Scheme
+2
Correct Answer
Full marks awarded
−0.50
Wrong Answer
Negative marking
0
Not Attempted
No penalty
🎨 Question Palette — Status Symbols
  • Not Visited — You have not visited the question yet.
  • Not Answered — You visited but did not answer the question.
  • Answered — You have answered and saved the question.
  • Marked for Review — Not answered, but marked to revisit.
  • Answered + Marked for Review — Answered and also marked to revisit. This answer will be evaluated.
⚠️ Note: If a question is answered and marked for review, the answer will be considered for evaluation. "Mark for Review" simply means you want to revisit it.
🧭 Navigating & Answering Questions
  1. Click on the question number in the Question Palette on the right to go to any question directly. (This does NOT save your current answer.)
  2. Click Save & Next to save your answer and move to the next question.
  3. Click Mark for Review & Next to save your answer, mark it for review, and move to the next question.
  4. Click Clear Response to deselect your chosen answer.
  5. You can switch between Part-A, Part-B, Part-C, Part-D at any time using the Part tabs in the toolbar. The shared timer continues running.
  6. After the last question of a section, clicking Save & Next will automatically take you to the first question of the next section.
  7. All sections, except English Comprehension, can be attempted in both English and Hindi. You may change language per question.
  8. ONLY questions for which answers are saved or answered & marked for review will be considered for evaluation.
  9. Click Submit Test only when you are sure you want to end the exam. Once submitted, you cannot go back.
Staff Selection Commission

⏱ Duration: 60 Mins 📝 100 Questions 🏆 Maximum Marks: 200
📋 Section-wise Details
PART-A · Reasoning
25 Questions  ·  50 Marks
PART-B · General Awareness
25 Questions  ·  50 Marks
PART-C · Quantitative Aptitude
25 Questions  ·  50 Marks
PART-D · English Comprehension
25 Questions  ·  50 Marks
⚠️ Important Rules
  1. The test contains 4 Parts with 25 questions each — total 100 questions, 200 marks.
  2. Each question has 4 options (A, B, C, D) — only one is correct.
  3. Duration: 60 Minutes for all 4 parts combined. You may attempt parts in any order.
  4. Marking Scheme: +2 for correct, −0.50 for wrong, 0 for unattempted.
  5. All sections except English Comprehension are bilingual (English / Hindi).
  6. Do NOT close the browser tab or press the back button during the exam.
  7. The exam will auto-submit when the timer reaches zero.
🌐 Choose Language
📌 Questions will appear in the selected language. You can change language for each individual question during the exam.
